title: Assignment 1
text: This page contains my Assignment 1 work.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Introduction
This assignment focuses on decision making with analytics.
The goal of this assignment is to analyze a dataset and apply analytical methods to support decision making.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Problem Description
In this assignment, we investigate a decision-making problem using available data.
The objective is to understand the relationships between variables and draw insights that can support better decisions.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Data
The dataset used in this assignment contains observations related to the problem being analyzed.
The variables represent different characteristics that may influence the decision outcome.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Methodology
The analysis will include:

Data exploration

Descriptive statistics

Visualization

Analytical interpretation

These methods help identify patterns and relationships in the data.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Results
The results of the analysis will provide insights into the factors affecting the decision problem.
Visualizations and summary statistics will be used to support the findings.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Conclusion
This assignment demonstrates how analytical tools can support decision making.
The findings highlight important patterns in the data and provide a foundation for further analysis.
